class.description: Lookahead pursuit controller that delegates to texnitis_nav_core::LookaheadController. Holonomic by default; set `<name>.use_diff_drive: true` to switch to diff-drive kinematics. Uses a stateful GoalChecker so transient localization wobble cannot un-set the xy-reached flag.

Differential drive pure pursuit with speed-scaled lookahead and acceleration limits. Delegates to texnitis_nav_core::DiffDrivePurePursuitController. Always emits vy=0; configure max_acceleration and max_angular_acceleration to match the actuators.
